name: rocky entrance-way
hints: The pyramid entrance has a sarcophagus, bandages, a door, and a pistol.
GET PIS for the pistol and GET BAN for the bandages. OPEN SAR to open the sarcophagus.
The sarcophagus contains hidden stairs going down. N leads to the dining hall.
OPEN SAR reveals stairs inside (room 7). GET PIS for protection. N=dining hall (12), S=sitting room (16). GO DOO exits to desert (room 4).
notes: Pyramid entrance. Sarcophagus contains stairs to lower levels. Pistol and bandages are important. N=dining hall (12), S=sitting room (16), GO DOO=desert (4).
